div.head: 41. Memorandum of a Conversation Between Prime Minister Mollet and Secretary of State Dulles, Washington, February 26, 1957Source: Department of State, Conference Files: Lot 62 D 181, CF 833A. Secret. Drafted by Dulles.
div.p: At the dinnerThe dinner took place at the Pan American Union. (Eisenhower Library, Dulles Papers, Appointment Book) I gave for Mollet I spoke to him about French intentions with respect to nuclear weapons. He said that so far as he personally was concerned he would never approve of France going into this. However, he felt that France should reserve the right to do so.
